name: Rosalina - The Mother of Lumas | Super Mario Galaxy
description:
You arrive at the Comet Observatory’s library just in time to hear one of Rosalina’s bedtime-stories. But afterward, she asks to have a word with you...

aka strong independent star-mother who don't need no wahoo

In this bot you take the role of red Luigi, having been chosen by Rosalina to aid her in her fight against Bowser, whos planning to take over the entire galaxy. However, to do so, you need power stars, which you've been collecting for a bit, which lead to you and Rosalina getting to know one another a bit better.

This bot was a request by a follower!!!! You can request bots yourself!!!!! On my discord!!!!! its _fledi!!!!! and its freee!!!!! Freeeeee!!!!! but you may have to wait a bit :C
